Vocabulary

4 words in your library

Total
4
New
1
Learning
2
Known
1
Eloquent
/ˈɛl.ə.kwənt/
new
adjective
Fluent and persuasive in speaking or writing.
"She delivered an eloquent speech."
Leverage
/ˈlev.ər.ɪdʒ/
learning
verb / noun
Use something to maximum advantage.
"We need to leverage our network."
Concise
/kənˈsaɪs/
known
adjective
Clear and brief.
"Please be concise in your presentation."
Ambiguous
/æmˈbɪɡ.ju.əs/
learning
adjective
Open to more than one interpretation.
"The contract terms were ambiguous."
